title: tarachia lanceolata
intro: Tarachia lanceolata is a plant species that belongs to the family Connaraceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tarachia lanceolata include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Tarachia lanceolata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
